Con vista sul giardino, Vakantiehuisje het Hert, mooi centraal in Friesland propone un alloggio con patio e macchina da caffГѓВЁ, a circa 24 km da Posthuis Theater. Situata a 22 km da Holland Casino Leeuwarden, la struttura prevede un giardino e il parcheggio privato gratuito.

Questo appartamento comprende 1 camera da letto, una cucina con frigorifero e lavastoviglie e 1 bagno con doccia, set di cortesia e lavatrice. Presso questo appartamento troverete asciugamani e lenzuola in dotazione.

In loco ГѓВЁ disponibile una terrazza, mentre nelle vicinanze di questo appartamento potrete praticare il canottaggio.

Grou-Irnsum Station ГѓВЁ a 6,4 km da Vakantiehuisje het Hert, mooi centraal in Friesland, mentre Sneek Noord Station si trova a 8,4 km di distanza.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Appartementen aan het water in Heeg offers a garden and terrace with lake views. Free WiFi is available throughout the property.
Modern Amenities: Each apartment features a private bathroom, kitchen with modern appliances, and a dining area. Additional amenities include a TV, refrigerator, and washing machine.
Convenient Location: Located 90 km from Groningen Eelde Airport, the property is near attractions such as Posthuis Theater (32 km) and Holland Casino Leeuwarden (39 km). Boating is available in the surrounding area.
Guest Satisfaction: Highly rated by guests, the apartment is pet-friendly and offers free on-site private parking.
Couples particularly like the location Гўв‚¬вЂќ they rated it 9.8 for a two-person trip.
